revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-220

A timing device for opening or closing one or more electric circuits at predetermined times.


Note:  A time switch that operates at sunrise and sunset is called a solar switch.

{{IALAFooter}}
